input.description: List all route.ts files created under api/ai

content.text:
All 17 API route files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of every file and its corresponding service import:

| # | Route File | Service Import | Endpoint Pattern |
|---|-----------|----------------|-----------------|
| 1 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\generate\route.ts` | `@/services/generator` | Action-based: solution, blogArchitecture, fullArticle |
| 2 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\mega-generate\route.ts` | `@/services/mega-generator` | Single: megaGenerate(url) |
| 3 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\solution-mega\route.ts` | `@/services/solution-mega-generator` | Single: generateAllSolutions(...) |
| 4 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\smc\route.ts` | `@/services/smc` | Action-based: fiche, faq, brief, fullArticle |
| 5 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\content-writer\route.ts` | `@/services/content_writer` | Single: generateContent(input) |
| 6 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\schema-org\route.ts` | `@/services/schema_service` | Action-based: generate, generateWithAI |
| 7 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\robots-txt\route.ts` | `@/services/robots_service` | Action-based: generate, parse, detectPlatform, generateWithAI |
| 8 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\llms-txt\route.ts` | `@/services/llms-txt-generator` | Single: generateLlmsTxt(config) |
| 9 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\llm-json\route.ts` | `@/services/llm-json-generator` | Single: generateLlmJson(config) |
| 10 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\reputation\route.ts` | `@/services/reputation_service` | Action-based: scan, generateResponse |
| 11 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\citation-simulator\route.ts` | `@/services/ai-citation-simulator` | Single: simulateCitation(...) |
| 12 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\answer-first\route.ts` | `@/services/answer-first-audit` | Single: auditAnswerFirst(url, brandName) |
| 13 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\monitoring\route.ts` | `@/services/ai-monitoring` | Single: runMonitoringScan(...) |
| 14 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\eeat\route.ts` | `@/services/eeat` | Action-based: authorBio, aboutPage, trustSignals, credentials, citationBlock, audit |
| 15 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\response-layer\route.ts` | `@/services/ai-response-layer` | Action-based: hub, queryPage, recommendJson, sitemapAi |
| 16 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\v3\citation\route.ts` | `@/services/v3/citation-checker` | Action-based: check, aggregate |
| 17 | `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\app\api\ai\v3\query-gen\route.ts` | `@/services/v3/query-generator` | Single: generateTrackedQueries(...) |

Every route file follows the same consistent pattern:
- Imports `NextRequest` and `NextResponse` from `next/server`
- Imports the relevant service function(s) from `@/services/*`
- Exports a `POST` async handler that reads the JSON body, calls the service, and returns a JSON response
- Wraps logic in try/catch, returning a 500 status with the error message on failure
- Action-based routes use a `switch` statement on the `action` field and return 400 for unknown actions
